character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group that asked the narrator to write the story.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Visited the patient (my father) and had dinner with the family.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Stayed at the Admiral Benbow inn, had a sabre cut, drank rum, and was feared by others.

character_dossiers.name: the old sea-dog
character_dossiers.biography: Stayed at the Admiral Benbow inn, had a sabre cut, drank rum, and was feared by others.
